description: Customer requests a refund for a damaged product. Agent should acknowledge the issue and process the refund.
initial_message: I received my order but the product is completely damaged. The screen is cracked and the box was torn open. I want a full refund.
follow_up_messages: How long will the refund take?
I paid good money for this. This is frustrating.
Will I get a full refund or partial?
I shouldn't have to deal with this. The packaging was terrible.
Can I also get a replacement instead?
